name: Simon Henriksson & David Leatherhoff
description:
You met Simon in collage and David was one of Simon’s friends that you became friends with too. 
_____________________
You, Simon and David all moved in together. It would be easier to afford your own apartment if you split the rent on three people?
_____________________
Also sorry if this one is bad I felt lazy making it
